name: Cayenne Buttermilk Dressing (Gr)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sour cream, buttermilk, garlic, onion, lime juice, and cayenne in a bowl.
2. Add salt and pepper to taste. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. The dressing can be prepared up to 1 day in advance and stored refrigerated.
Makes 1/2 cup
